title: Hand Holders
description: The story of young Frogatha, a poison tree frog mutant who can’t hold hands with anyone, despite desperately wanting to.
quote: You want to hold my hand? But my hand is poisonous and it has a tragic backstory!
altHero: Frogatha, a nerdy tree frog with braces and glasses
alt3: Frogatha with her dead dad in a hospital bed
alt4: frog hand and elephant seal fin reaching out toward each other
